note: Balancer V2 Vault user pre-sign surface triage (deeper-onboarding pass 2026-06-03). Manifests now cover single swaps, relayer approval, AND batchSwap + joinPool + exitPool (the dominant direct traffic — measured 38.2%/6.8%/21.2% of recent direct Vault tx). Admin/asset-manager/query paths excluded; flashLoan + manageUserBalance deferred with measured usage.

0x945bcec9.name: batchSwap
0x945bcec9.reason: user AMM action: Balancer V2 multi-hop batch swap (aggregate Amm::Swap via $fn balancer_v2_batch_swap_field indirect-index resolution). 38.2% of recent direct Vault tx (mainnet).

0x7d3aeb96.name: deregisterTokens
0x7d3aeb96.reason: pool administration / asset-manager maintenance; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x8bdb3913.name: exitPool
0x8bdb3913.reason: user liquidity action: Balancer V2 remove_liquidity (PooledBurn). assets[]/minAmountsOut[] zipped by $fn balancer_zip_token_amounts; lp_token from poolId via $fn balancer_pool_id_to_address; lp_amount from userData ExitKind via $fn balancer_v2_userdata_field. 21.2% of recent direct Vault tx.

0x5c38449e.name: flashLoan
0x5c38449e.reason: DEFERRED: integrator flash-loan callback primitive (requires an IFlashLoanRecipient callback contract; not a retail EOA pre-sign swap/liquidity intent). Measured 3.6% of recent direct Vault tx (predominantly arb/integrator). The callback risk is in the recipient, not statically modelable as a simple ActionBody.

0xb95cac28.name: joinPool
0xb95cac28.reason: user liquidity action: Balancer V2 add_liquidity (Pooled). assets[]/maxAmountsIn[] zipped by $fn balancer_zip_token_amounts; min_lp_out from userData JoinKind via $fn balancer_v2_userdata_field. 6.8% of recent direct Vault tx.

0xe6c46092.name: managePoolBalance
0xe6c46092.reason: pool/asset-manager balance management; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x0e8e3e84.name: manageUserBalance
0x0e8e3e84.reason: DEFERRED internal-balance bookkeeping path (deposit/withdraw/internal-transfer); needs a dedicated ActionBody rather than mislabeling as a plain ERC20 transfer. Measured <1% of recent direct Vault tx — low-priority follow-up.

0xf84d066e.name: queryBatchSwap
0xf84d066e.reason: quote helper used as live-input source; nonpayable for revert-based simulation but not a user state-changing intent

0x09b2760f.name: registerPool
0x09b2760f.reason: pool registration / factory administration; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x66a9c7d2.name: registerTokens
0x66a9c7d2.reason: pool token registration / asset-manager setup; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x058a628f.name: setAuthorizer
0x058a628f.reason: governance/admin authorizer replacement; not a retail wallet user action

0x16c38b3c.name: setPaused
0x16c38b3c.reason: governance/emergency pause control; not a retail wallet user action

0xfa6e671d.name: setRelayerApproval
0xfa6e671d.reason: permission primitive: grants/revokes Balancer V2 relayer authorization for a user

0x52bbbe29.name: swap
0x52bbbe29.reason: user AMM action: Balancer V2 single-pool swap
